ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account held by the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account manager assigned to the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client owning the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy used for the portfolio */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the portfolio */,
  "target_return" REAL /* Target return percentage for the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of the fund (e.g., ETF, Mutual Fund) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund manager */,
  "fund_size" REAL /* Total size of the fund */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* Expense ratio of the fund */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date when the fund was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fund manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fund manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the manager belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the fund manager */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the fund manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio containing the holding */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund owning the holding */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company in which the investment is made */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* CUSIP number of the investment */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares held */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the holding */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the holding in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the holding was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the holding was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_company_name FOREIGN KEY ("company_name") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* CUSIP number of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN of the company */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* SEDOL of the company */,
  "sector_classification" TEXT /* Sector classification of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the holding for which the data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the data is recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Closing price of the investment on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the investment on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the investment on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the investment on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_holding_id FOREIGN KEY ("holding_id") REFERENCES holdings ("holding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the holding for which the transaction is made */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share at which the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was settled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_holding_id FOREIGN KEY ("holding_id") REFERENCES holdings ("holding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio for which the metric is calculated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the metric is calculated */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "calmar_ratio" REAL /* Calmar ratio of the portfolio on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio for which the check is performed */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the regulatory rule being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory rule being checked */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check (e.g., pass, fail, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
